_README: Copy this to marshal-secrets.staging.json or marshal-secrets.production.json and fill in real values. Populated files are gitignored. Feed to scripts/seed-secrets.sh via `npm run seed:staging` / `npm run seed:production`. Any value containing REPLACE_ME blocks the seed — guard against accidental empty/placeholder deploys. The grafana-cloud/otlp-auth block's basic_auth is auto-computed from instance_id + api_token if you leave it off.
